message:
refactor(codegen): Continue hoisted_vars migration and cleanup

- Migrate 5 more standalone hoisted_vars.contains() patterns to
  varResolutionIsHoisted() (imports.zig, for_basic.zig, conditionals.zig,
  function_gen.zig)
- Simplify 3 redundant "hoisted_vars.contains(x) or isDeclared(x)"
  patterns to just "isDeclared(x)" (try_except.zig)

hoisted_vars.contains() count: 18 -> 10
